rationale: Top-level automated review summary; the actionable inline retrieval-gateway auth-source comment is tracked separately.
Removed legacy worker_token from the scoped retrieval auth-source set and updated the scope error text to reference retrieval tokens.
Allowed retrieval_gateway_auth_missing to use degraded local fallback and added regression coverage for that path.
Changed retrieval gateway authorization so an authenticated OIDC user is accepted before scoped retrieval-token header validation and added regression coverage.
Top-level Codex review wrapper; actionable inline comments from the review are tracked separately.
